name: Dondakaya Vepudu
steps: Slice the dondakaya lengthwise into thin strips.
Heat oil, crackle mustard seeds and add curry leaves and sliced onion.
Add the dondakaya with turmeric and salt, and fry uncovered on medium heat.
When they shrink and brown, sprinkle chilli powder and peanut powder.
Fry two more minutes and serve with rice.
